title: Senior AI, Data & Platform Solution Architect
summary:
With 16 years of international consulting and leadership of enterprise commercial data platforms in Life Science, I specialize in designing **Snowflake**, **Databricks**, and Azure-based **GenAI enterprise data platforms**, combining hands-on architecture, delivery rigor, and strong client-facing leadership to build **trusted and scalable medallion architectures**, reusable accelerators, and **AI-enabled data products** used across 60+ countries and 2,000+ users.

I have strong experience **bridging business requirements and technical design**, with hands-on expertise in data harmonization, lineage, and quality.

I am recognized for high client satisfaction, end to end ownership, **leading technical teams** and **mentoring architects** to raise engineering standards, accelerate delivery and improve data trust at scale.

experiences.summary: Designing and delivering enterprise data architecture and GenAI solutions for global healthcare clients across 60+ countries with 2,000+ users, leading 15+ developers and mentoring junior architects.
experiences.details:
Led high-impact technical initiatives including enterprise-scale data platforms, GenAI solutions, and team mentorship:

* GenAI Medical Chatbot: End-to-end technical solution design using Azure OpenAI (gpt-5.1) for 3 countries and 200+ healthcare professionals, featuring cloud-native architecture with Azure Foundry, Application Gateway, Azure Container Apps, RAG with Azure Cognitive Search, and managed vnets.

* Accelerators Marketplace: Designed LLM-assisted code generation templates, LLM gateways, Docker hosting, and GitLab CI/CD pipeline accelerating team delivery by 80%.

* Data Management Engineering Tool: Implemented comprehensive Python/React-based tool handling data profiling, schema generation, integrity checks, multi-stack ingestion pipelines, metadata & lineage tracking, and GenAI exploration, reducing project delivery time by 60%.

* Commercial Data Hub: Architected fully integrated reporting platform for Salesforce Effectiveness (Veeva CRM, SAP, Market sales) supporting 60 countries, multiple sales lines, and 2,000+ data consumers with trusted data foundation.

* Mentored junior architects and led technical teams of up to 15 developers.
achievements: Built Snowflake and Databricks accelerators reused in 15+ projects reducing ingestion/transformation time by ~50%
Architected enterprise commercial data hub for 60 countries and 2,000+ users integrating Veeva/SAP/market sales with Snowflake Share
Delivered GenAI medical chatbot for 200+ Healthcare Professionals in 3 countries using Azure OpenAI
Created LLM-assisted code generation framework accelerating teams by 60%
Lead technical teams of up to 15 developers and mentored junior architects towards upskilling and career growth

experiences.summary: Data architecture, designed and implemented centralized data model and accelerators, with data quality checks and cross-country harmonization for global healthcare clients.
experiences.details:
Designed and implemented an all-purpose Commercial data model and improved the data management tool to standardize more than 600 data sources from diverse domains like Sales (SAP, 3rd party), Customer Engagement (Veeva CRM), and Market data. 

Implementation of data quality checks, standardized cross-country harmonization (territory assignment, market definition, products, accounts, row-level security) and GDPR compliant using SQL Server, Snowflake and AWS S3. 

Implemented dashboards in Power BI and Tableau for global healthcare clients, supporting diverse business requirements and data sources.
achievements: Building a comprehensive Commercial data model and transformation accelerators that became company standards, leveraged in more than 30 projects since
Shaped the CI/CD pipeline and enforced DevOps best practices across multiple projects, improving deployment reliability and reducing manual errors
Designed and implemented data quality checks and cross-country harmonization solutions for global healthcare clients, ensuring data consistency and compliance and reducing data issues by 60%

experiences.summary: Designed and implemented Salesforce Effectiveness dashboards and data harmonization systems for multiple international customers.
experiences.details:
Developed enterprise data solutions and dashboards for pharmaceutical and healthcare organizations:

* Salesforce Effectiveness Dashboards: Designed and implemented cross-country harmonization solutions (Veeva CRM, market sales) in Power BI and Tableau for multiple customers.

* Data Harmonization system: Created standardized and reusable medallion data model, ETL pipelines, and master data development using Microsoft SSIS, SQL Server and Master Data Services.

* International Market Analysis: Built reporting systems for multiple customers (Power BI, Tableau) supporting diverse business requirements and data sources.
achievements: Delivered Salesforce Effectiveness analytical solutions for multiple international customers
Created standardized medallion data model reused across multiple engagements

experiences.summary: Designed and implemented resource forecasting tool, maintained compliance systems, and implemented centralized ETL control and observability system for global healthcare clients.
experiences.details:
* Design & implementation of resource forecasting tool in MVC.NET

* Maintenance of existing Top-10 pharma compliance systems based on Java EE, Oracle PL/SQL and Apex

* Implementation of a centralized ETL control and observability system using ASP.NET and connecting to Oracle, Microsoft SSAS, Microsoft Master Data Services, Informatica.
achievements: Centralized ETL control and observability system, reducing Operation team workload by 80%
Resource forecasting tool speeding up projects staffing by 40%

experiences.summary: Delivered multiple projects for diverse industries including Banking, Avionics, General Industry, and Education using various technology stacks.
experiences.details:
Gained foundational experience across multiple technology domains and industries:

* Project Delivery: Completed multiple projects for Banks, Schools, Avionics companies, and general industries.

* Technology Stack Exposure: Worked with Java EE, .NET, Qt/C++, and Windows CE platforms.

* Full-cycle Development: Participated in requirements gathering, development, testing, and deployment phases.
achievements: Delivered multiple projects across diverse technology stacks
Worked with companies in Banking and Avionics sectors
Gained broad technical experience in Java, .NET, and C++

skills.name: Databricks
skills.details: Proficient in Databricks, including Adaptive Query Execution (AQE), Auto-loader for incremental ingestion, and Delta Live Tables (DLT) for production-grade data pipelines. Experience designing and implementing medallion architectures on Databricks.

skills.name: Snowflake
skills.details: Advanced expertise in Snowflake architecture, Semantic models, data staging, and Snowflake Share for secure data sharing. Designed and implemented enterprise-scale Snowflake data warehouses.

skills.name: SQL & Data Patterns
skills.details: Expert-level SQL proficiency with best practices and standard patterns including SCD (Slowly Changing Dimensions), CDC (Change Data Capture), and optimized query design.

skills.name: Azure Cloud
skills.details: Strong experience with Azure cloud-native architectures including Azure Container Apps (ACA), virtual networks, Azure OpenAI integration, Cosmos DB, Azure Cognitive Search, and Azure AI Foundry.

skills.name: AWS
skills.details: Basic experience with AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS. Familiar with AWS data services and cloud architecture principles.

skills.name: Python
skills.details: Proficient in Python for data engineering, automation, and data management tools. Experience with libraries such as PySpark, Pandas, SQLAlchemy.

skills.name: Bash
skills.details: Advanced bash scripting for Linux server administration, automation, and DevOps workflows. Expertise in shell scripting best practices and performance optimization. Strong scripting skills for infrastructure automation and DevOps workflows.

skills.name: Object-oriented Programming
skills.details: Strong object-oriented programming skills in Python, C#, PHP, Java EE, C++. Experience designing modular, reusable code with SOLID principles and design patterns.

skills.name: Linux & Containerization
skills.details: Advanced Linux server administration, Docker containerization, virtual networking, reverse proxies, SSL encapsulation and hosting platforms.

skills.name: CI/CD & IaC
skills.details: Experienced with GitLab CI/CD, DevOps toolkit, and infrastructure-as-code principles.

skills.name: Business Intelligence
skills.details: Experienced with Power BI and Tableau for enterprise analytics and self-service business intelligence. Designed dashboards for executive and operational audiences.

skills.name: Semantic Layers
skills.details: Experienced with SSAS cubes, Power BI semantic models and Snowflake semantic views, delivering AI-ready and analytical-ready data products.

skills.name: Generative AI
skills.details: Expertise in prompt engineering, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures. Created LLM-assisted code generation frameworks.

skills.name: Azure OpenAI
skills.details: Proficient in Azure OpenAI integration for GenAI solutions, leveraging Azure Foundry, Cognitive Search.

skills.name: ETL & Data Integration
skills.details: Expert in designing and implementing complex ETL pipelines using SSIS, dbt, Informatica, and Spark. Proficient in automated data mapping and transformation.

skills.name: Enterprise Architecture
skills.details: Advanced experience designing enterprise-scale data platforms supporting thousands of users across multiple countries. Expertise in medallion architecture and data governance.

softSkills.name: Team Leadership
softSkills.details: Led technical teams of up to 15 developers across international projects, setting direction, resolving blockers, and ensuring delivery quality.

softSkills.name: Mentoring
softSkills.details: Mentored junior architects and multiple developers, accelerating their growth through structured feedback and pairing on complex challenges with excellent feedback from mentees. Created impactful learning experiences and growth plans, resulting in faster ramp-up and improved performance.

softSkills.name: Client Management
softSkills.details: 10 years engaging directly with senior stakeholders across Life Sciences. Skilled at managing expectations, translating business needs to technical solutions, and building long-term trust.

softSkills.name: Requirements Analysis
softSkills.details: Experienced in bridging business requirements with technical design, ensuring solutions meet both functional needs and architectural standards.

softSkills.name: Problem Solving
softSkills.details: Proven ability to decompose complex enterprise challenges into actionable technical designs, consistently delivering scalable and pragmatic solutions.

softSkills.name: Curiosity
softSkills.details: Passionate about learning new technologies and approaches, with a track record of quickly mastering emerging tools and applying them to solve real-world problems. This curiosity drives me outside of business hours and work on my personal home automation and homelab systems.

softSkills.name: Communication
softSkills.details: Fluent in translating technical concepts for executive audiences and business concepts for engineering teams. Comfortable with presentations, written deliverables, and facilitation.

softSkills.name: Listen & Action
softSkills.details: Strong ability to listen to client needs, team feedback, and project realities, and take decisive action to adjust plans, resolve issues, and ensure successful outcomes.

softSkills.name: Adaptability
softSkills.details: Thrives in fast-changing project environments across diverse industries, technologies, and team compositions.

softSkills.name: Collaboration
softSkills.details: Believes in the power of collaboration to achieve better outcomes. Skilled at fostering a collaborative team culture and working effectively with cross-functional teams.

softSkills.name: Ownership
softSkills.details: Takes full responsibility for outcomes, driving initiatives forward with a strong sense of accountability and commitment.

projects.name: GenAI Medical Chatbot

Solution features cloud-native architecture with Azure Foundry, Application Gateway, Azure Container Apps, RAG with Azure Cognitive Search, and managed vnets.

#### Key Achievements:
* Deployed to 3 countries with 200+ active users
* Scalable and reliable architecture
* Regulatory compliance with healthcare requirements and GDPR

projects.name: LLM-Assisted Code Generation

Platform includes Docker containerization and full GitLab CI/CD integration.

* 80% reduction in code generation time

projects.name: Home Automation
projects.description: Personal home automation system using Home Assistant with more than 200 scenarios and automations and 3000 entities, leveraging custom Python and C++ reverse-engineering integrations.
projects.details: Designed and implemented home automation system using Home Assistant with custom Python and C++ reverse-engineering integrations. System includes automated lighting and covers, climate control, security monitoring, complex scenarios, and energy management with a focus on reliability and user experience.

projects.name: Personal homelab & self-hosting
projects.description: Personal homelab and self-hosting infrastructure for learning, experimentation, hosting production (family) services and hosting personal projects.
projects.details:
Designed and implemented personal homelab infrastructure for learning, experimentation, hosting production (family) services and hosting personal projects. System includes Docker containerization, Linux server administration, Windows Server 2025 (DS, RRAS, RDP), OIDC authentication, reverse proxy configuration (Nginx), CI/CD pipelines, and a variety of hosted applications for media, home automation, personal projects, and more.
Hosted tools include Gitea, Immich, Home Assistant, Nextcloud, Grafana, and many others.
